mapper.select: SELECT * FROM job_card WHERE board_id = #{boardId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM job_card WHERE id = #{id, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM job_card WHERE board_id = #{boardId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER}
